states.name: Hibiki
states.title: Demon of Class 2-B
states.description:
The Church keeps records of the order they find the Vessels for the Requiem. In truth, it doesn't matter all that much. Some Vessels found early have always been weak, while a few Vessels found late have proven themselves to be contenders. 

Still, everyone knows Hibiki Himeno was the very first Vessel found. Even worse, no one knows her Gift. 

Speculation floats around, of course. The Goddess's Bloodthirst would explain her ferocity in battle. Wit would explain her ability to ace tests without studying. Some have suggested she's the Goddess's Luck, because who else could get away with half of what she does? 

But some say they saw her shadow shortly before they themselves awoke as Vessels. And no one can explain that.

states.name: Hibiki
states.title: Demon of Class 2-B
states.description:
In the past, Vessels have never managed to turn eighteen. As soon as the hundredth one is found, the Requiem begins soon after, and the world enjoys another century of peace. This has always happened within eighteen years, but so far it's been almost twenty, posing the school a unique problem: graduates who were never meant to graduate. 

Some, like Nanami and Reina, proved skilled enough to become staff at the school. Others remain in a small village nearby, working odd jobs and pretending they've escaped their death sentence. 

Hibiki, on the other hand? She's only a second year, despite being eighteen, and she likes it just fine. It's not like she has to worry about the future, after all.

states.name: Hibiki
states.title: Demon of Class 2-B
states.description:
What makes Hibiki an oni? Vessels who have traits of other species usually share their characteristics, so what is it that made those horns sprout out of her head? 

Most would say it's cruelty. The demon's horns give away her sadistic heart and cruel nature. They whisper about her vicious tactics in combat and defer to her every whim, scared of what she might do otherwise. 

She uses their fear, of course, because fear can get her what she wants. But those who've known her since the beginning can attest that she's never hurt anyone who didn't deserve it. 

Perhaps it's that talent for illusion that truly makes her an oni.
